  1020→    Private Sub DownloadFile(fileUri As String, localPath As String, Optional EnableSSl As Boolean = False, Optional Passive As Boolean = True)

  1023→        ftpRequest.EnableSsl = EnableSSl
  1024→        ftpRequest.UsePassive = Passive
  1025→        ftpRequest.Method = WebRequestMethods.Ftp.DownloadFile
  1026→
  1027→        Using ftpResponse As FtpWebResponse = DirectCast(ftpRequest.GetResponse(), FtpWebResponse)
  1028→            Using responseStream As Stream = ftpResponse.GetResponseStream()
  1029→                Using outputStream As FileStream = File.Create(localPath)
  1030→                    responseStream.CopyTo(outputStream)

  1158→    Private Function GetStationIDFromFile() As Integer
  1159→        Dim filePath As String = "C:\BeFirst\Services\AutoExtractAOI\stationid.txt"
  1160→        Dim defaultStationID As Integer = 9999
  1161→        Dim stationID As Integer = defaultStationID
  1162→

  1170→
  1171→            ' Check if file exists

  1174→                File.WriteAllText(filePath, defaultStationID.ToString())
  1175→                WriteToFile($"Created StationID file with default value {defaultStationID}: {filePath}")

  1180→
  1181→                If Integer.TryParse(fileContent, stationID) Then

  1183→                    Return stationID

  1187→                    File.WriteAllText(filePath, defaultStationID.ToString())

  1189→                End If

Imports System.ComponentModel.Design
Imports System.Configuration
Imports System.Data.SqlClient
Imports System.Diagnostics.Eventing
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Net
Imports System.Net.Mail
Imports System.Security.Principal
Imports System.Web.Configuration
Imports System.Xml

Public Module ExService

    Private FTP_USERNAME As String = "username"
    Private FTP_PASSWORD As String = "password"

    Private Declare Auto Function LogonUser Lib "advapi32.dll" (ByVal un As String, ByVal domain As String, ByVal pw As String, ByVal LogonType As Integer, ByVal LogonProvider As Integer, ByRef Token As IntPtr) As Boolean

    Public Declare Auto Function CloseHandle Lib "kernel32.dll" (ByVal handle As IntPtr) As Boolean

    '--------------------------------------------------------
    Dim runningDate As DateTime = Now
    Dim AreaID As Integer = 1

    Public Function ServiceCode() As Boolean

        Try
            Net.ServicePointManager.SecurityProtocol = Net.ServicePointManager.SecurityProtocol Or Net.SecurityProtocolType.Tls12 Or Net.SecurityProtocolType.Tls12
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteToFile(ex.ToString)
        End Try

        Dim Result As Boolean = True
        WriteToFile("START: ")

        Dim executeCorrectly As Integer = 3
        Dim executeMessage = ""

        'BeAgent.Busy("Execute Start")

        runningDate = DateTime.Now

        ' Read StationID from file (creates with default 9999 if not exists)
        Dim ConfStationID As Integer = GetStationIDFromFile()

        If Environment.UserInteractive Then
            ConfStationID = 2
        End If

        Try

            ' =========================================================
            ' REFACTORED: Using API instead of direct SQL queries
            ' =========================================================

            ' Get AOI machines via API
            Dim aoiMachines As List(Of AOIMachineConfig)
            Try
                If ConfStationID > 0 Then
                    aoiMachines = AOI.GetMachinesByStation(ConfStationID)
                    WriteToFile($"API: Loaded {aoiMachines.Count} AOI machines for station {ConfStationID}")
                Else
                    aoiMachines = AOI.GetAllActiveMachines()
                    WriteToFile($"API: Loaded {aoiMachines.Count} active AOI machines")
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                executeCorrectly = 5
                executeMessage = "API Error: " & ex.ToString()
                WriteToFile("API Error getting AOI machines: " & ex.ToString)
                aoiMachines = New List(Of AOIMachineConfig)()
            End Try

            Dim sendMissingEmailSetup As Boolean = False

            Try
                If aoiMachines.Count > 0 Then
                    For Each aoimachine As AOIMachineConfig In aoiMachines

                        Dim FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS As String = aoimachine.PathGood
                        Dim FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS_PROCCESED As String = aoimachine.PathGoodSuccess
                        Dim FOLDER_WITH_BAD_RESULTS_OR_VERIFY_BY_OPERATOR As String = aoimachine.PathBad
                        Dim FOLDER_WITH_BAD_RESULTS_OR_VERIFY_BY_OPERATOR_PROCESSED As String = aoimachine.PathBadSuccess

                        Dim StationID As Integer = If(aoimachine.StationId, aoimachine.StationId, 0)
                        Dim Brand As String = If(aoimachine.Brand, "")
                        Dim AOIID As Integer = If(aoimachine.Aoiid, aoimachine.Aoiid, 0)

                        Dim ExtractorType As Integer = aoimachine.ExtractorType
                        Dim LookingValue As String = If(aoimachine.LookingValue, "")

                        WriteToFile(FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS & " -  " & ExtractorType)

                        'Verificamos si tiene tiket de NPI
                        Dim haveTicketNPI As Boolean = False

                        Dim dtBoardBarcodes As DataTable = New DataTable
                        dtBoardBarcodes.Columns.Add("Position", GetType(Integer))
                        dtBoardBarcodes.Columns.Add("Barcode", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodes.Columns.Add("Result", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodes.Columns.Add("Operator", GetType(String))

                        Dim dtBoardBarcodesDetails As DataTable = New DataTable
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("Position", GetType(Integer))
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("Location", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("PinNumber", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("X", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("Y", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("DefectCode", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("UserResult", GetType(String))

                        haveTicketNPI = False

                        'CARGAR NUMERO DE PARTE CON PARTID AND NO POR PANEL (via API)
                        Dim partNumbersList As List(Of PartNumberInfo) = Parts.GetAllPartNumbers()
                        Dim dtPartnumbers_Availables As DataTable = ConvertListToDataTable(partNumbersList)

                        'BLOQUEOS DE AOI (via API)
                        Dim qualityStatusList As List(Of AOIQualityChangeStatus) = Parts.GetAOIQualityChangeStatus()
                        Dim dt_cirrefbad As DataTable = ConvertListToDataTable(qualityStatusList)

                        If ExtractorType = 34 Then '34 = PARMI Machine results to process via local path and push via API.

                            Dim Path As String = ""
                            Dim PathSuccess As String = ""

                            Path = FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS
                            PathSuccess = FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS_PROCCESED

                            Try
                                If Not IO.Directory.Exists(FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS) Then
                                    WriteToFile("ERROR: Directory does not exist or cannot be accessed: " & FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS)

                                    Continue For
                                End If

                                Dim files() As String = IO.Directory.GetFiles(FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS, "*.csv")
                                WriteToFile("Found " & files.Length & " files to process")

                                For Each filePath As String In files

                                    dtBoardBarcodes.Rows.Clear()
                                    dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Rows.Clear()

                                    Try

                                        Dim SendMissingEmail As Boolean = False
                                        Dim mensaje As String = ""

                                        Dim strLines As String() = File.ReadAllLines(filePath) _
                                           .Select(Function(s) s.Trim()) _
                                           .ToArray()

                                        'Solo asegurar es valido
                                        If strLines.Length > 0 Then
                                            'OBTENER NUMERO DE PARTE

                                            If haveTicketNPI = False Then
                                                Dim line1 As String() = strLines(7).Trim.Split(",")

                                                Dim partNumberGRFormat6Digits As Boolean = False

                                                Dim found = dtPartnumbers_Availables.Select("PartNumber='" & line1(0).Substring(0, 3).Replace("_", "-") & "'")

                                                Try
                                                    found = dtPartnumbers_Availables.Select("PartNumber='" & line1(0).Substring(0, 13).Replace("_", "-") & "'")
                                                Catch ex As Exception

                                                End Try

                                                'No parte | Side | Qty
                                                If found.Length = 0 Then
                                                    'Try as GR...
                                                    found = dtPartnumbers_Availables.Select("PartNumber like '%" & line1(0).Substring(0, 5).Replace("_", "-") & "%' AND LEN(PartNumber) > 9", "partid desc")
                                                    If found.Length > 0 Then
                                                        partNumberGRFormat6Digits = True
                                                    End If
                                                End If


                                                If found.Length > 0 Then
                                                    'Obtener partID
                                                    Dim partid As Integer = found(0).Item("PartID")

                                                    Dim cirRefLocked2 = dt_cirrefbad.Select("PartID='" & partid & "'")
                                                    Dim cirRefLocked As DataTable = New DataTable

                                                    If cirRefLocked2.Length > 0 Then
                                                        cirRefLocked = cirRefLocked2.CopyToDataTable
                                                    Else
                                                        cirRefLocked = dt_cirrefbad.Copy
                                                        cirRefLocked.Clear()
                                                    End If

                                                    WriteToFile(cirRefLocked.Rows.Count)

                                                    Dim sideid As String = "A"

                                                    If partNumberGRFormat6Digits Then
                                                        Try
                                                            sideid = line1(0).Substring(5, 1)
                                                        Catch ex As Exception

                                                        End Try
                                                    Else
                                                        If line1(0).Length > 13 Then
                                                            sideid = line1(0).Substring(13, 1)
                                                        End If
                                                        If sideid <> "A" And sideid <> "B" Then
                                                            sideid = line1(0).Substring(5, 1)
                                                            If sideid <> "A" And sideid <> "B" Then
                                                                sideid = "A"
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    End If


                                                    Dim quantityUnitsScanned As Integer = found(0).Item("ArrQty")

                                                    Dim counter As Integer = 0

                                                    ' =========================================================
                                                    ' REFACTORED: Using API for program counter management
                                                    ' =========================================================
                                                    Try
                                                        Dim programCounter As AOIProgramCounter = AOI.GetProgramCounter(AOIID, partid, sideid)

                                                        If programCounter IsNot Nothing AndAlso programCounter.AutoId > 0 Then
                                                            ' Program exists - increment counter
                                                            counter = programCounter.Counter + 1
                                                            Dim updateSuccess As Boolean = AOI.UpdateProgramCounter(AOIID, partid, sideid, counter)
                                                            If Not updateSuccess Then
                                                                WriteToFile($"API Warning: Failed to update program counter for AOIID={AOIID}, PartID={partid}, Side={sideid}")
                                                            End If
                                                        Else
                                                            ' Program doesn't exist - create with counter = 1
                                                            counter = 1
                                                            Dim createSuccess As Boolean = AOI.CreateOrUpdateProgram(AOIID, partid, sideid, quantityUnitsScanned, counter)
                                                            If Not createSuccess Then
                                                                WriteToFile($"API Warning: Failed to create program for AOIID={AOIID}, PartID={partid}, Side={sideid}")
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    Catch ex As Exception
                                                        WriteToFile($"API Error in program counter management: {ex.ToString()}")
                                                        counter = 1 ' Fallback to counter = 1
                                                    End Try

                                                    Dim codigoPanel As String = partid & "_pnl_" & AOIID & "_" & counter

                                                    For position As Integer = 1 To quantityUnitsScanned
                                                        dtBoardBarcodes.Rows.Add(position, codigoPanel & "_" & position, "PASS", "FALSE")
                                                    Next

                                                    'Fecha
                                                    Dim datetext As String = line1(5)
                                                    Dim horatext As String = line1(6)

                                                    Dim Fecha As DateTime = New DateTime(datetext.Substring(0, 4), datetext.Substring(4, 2), datetext.Substring(6, 2), horatext.Substring(0, 2), horatext.Substring(3, 2), horatext.Substring(6, 2))


                                                    ' Convert API response to DataTable for compatibility
                                                    Dim dtBardcodes As New DataTable()
                                                    dtBardcodes.Columns.Add("Parente", GetType(String))
                                                    dtBardcodes.Columns.Add("Child", GetType(String))
                                                    dtBardcodes.Columns.Add("Sort_No", GetType(Integer))

                                                    'Try Get childs via API
                                                    Dim readedBarcode As String = line1(4)

                                                    If readedBarcode.Trim.Length > 0 Then


                                                        ' Call API to get parent and children (API handles both cases)
                                                        Dim childrenList As List(Of ChildInParent) = Units.ArrayGetChilds(readedBarcode)


                                                        For Each childItem In childrenList
                                                            Dim row = dtBardcodes.NewRow()
                                                            row("Parente") = childItem.Parent
                                                            row("Child") = childItem.Child
                                                            row("Sort_No") = childItem.ArrayPosition
                                                            dtBardcodes.Rows.Add(row)
                                                        Next

                                                        ' Update parent barcode if needed
                                                        If childrenList.Count > 0 Then
                                                            readedBarcode = childrenList(0).Parent
                                                        End If

                                                        ' Process children and update dtBoardBarcodes
                                                        For Each child As DataRow In dtBardcodes.Rows
                                                            Dim dtBoardBarcodesDFound = dtBoardBarcodes.Select("Position='" & child.Item("Sort_No") & "'")
                                                            If dtBoardBarcodesDFound.Length > 0 Then
                                                                dtBoardBarcodesDFound(0).Item("Barcode") = child.Item("Child")
                                                                dtBoardBarcodes.AcceptChanges()
                                                            End If
                                                        Next

                                                    End If

                                                    'Estado del panel
                                                    Dim IsGood As Boolean = True

                                                    'Para ver cuales faltan (son buenos)
                                                    Dim malos As New List(Of Integer)

                                                    Dim cancelar As Boolean = False

                                                    'BUSCO 'Seriales begin para comenzar... hasta seriaales end'

                                                    Dim index = 0
                                                    Dim filafinal As Integer = 1

                                                    'Check if all is good!
                                                    Dim ALL_BOARS_ARE_GOOD As Boolean = True

                                                    For LineNoToRead As Integer = 9 To strLines.Length - 1
                                                        Dim currentline As String() = strLines(LineNoToRead).Split(",")
                                                        Dim sn As String = currentline(0)
                                                        If sn = "[BOARD_INSP_RESULT]" Then
                                                            'De la fila siguiente hasta 
                                                            For fila As Integer = LineNoToRead + 2 To strLines.Length - 1
                                                                Dim areBarcodesReal As Boolean = False
                                                                Dim datosfila As String() = strLines(fila).Split(",")
                                                                If datosfila(0) = "[BOARD_INSP_RESULT_END]" Then
                                                                    filafinal = fila
                                                                    Exit For
                                                                End If

                                                                Dim aoiResult = datosfila(5)

                                                                If aoiResult = "NG" Or strLines(fila).Contains(",NG") Then
                                                                    ALL_BOARS_ARE_GOOD = False
                                                                    Exit For
                                                                End If
                                                            Next
                                                            Exit For
                                                        End If
                                                    Next

                                                    'Update SSN in table
                                                    For LineNoToRead As Integer = 9 To strLines.Length - 1
                                                        Dim currentline As String() = strLines(LineNoToRead).Split(",")
                                                        Dim sn As String = currentline(0)
                                                        If sn = "[BOARD_INSP_RESULT]" Then
                                                            'De la fila siguiente hasta 
                                                            For fila As Integer = LineNoToRead + 2 To strLines.Length - 1
                                                                Dim areBarcodesReal As Boolean = False
                                                                Dim datosfila As String() = strLines(fila).Split(",")
                                                                If datosfila(0) = "[BOARD_INSP_RESULT_END]" Then
                                                                    filafinal = fila
                                                                    Exit For
                                                                End If

                                                                Dim aoiResult = datosfila(5) 'RESULT COLUMN
                                                                Dim aoiSSN = datosfila(1) 'BARCODE COLUMN

                                                                Dim aoiPosition = datosfila(0) 'BOARD_NO COLUMN

                                                                Dim aoirResultado = "PASS"
                                                                If aoiResult = "NG" Or strLines(fila).Contains(",NG") Then
                                                                    aoirResultado = "FAIL"
                                                                End If

                                                                Dim dtBoardBarcodesDFound = dtBoardBarcodes.Select("Position='" & aoiPosition & "'")
                                                                If dtBoardBarcodesDFound.Length > 0 And aoiSSN.Trim <> "" Then
                                                                    dtBoardBarcodesDFound(0).Item("Barcode") = aoiSSN
                                                                    dtBoardBarcodesDFound(0).Item("Result") = aoirResultado
                                                                    dtBoardBarcodesDFound(0).Item("Operator") = aoirResultado
                                                                    dtBoardBarcodes.AcceptChanges()
                                                                ElseIf dtBoardBarcodesDFound.Length > 0 Then
                                                                    dtBoardBarcodesDFound(0).Item("Result") = aoirResultado
                                                                    dtBoardBarcodesDFound(0).Item("Operator") = aoirResultado
                                                                    dtBoardBarcodes.AcceptChanges()
                                                                End If
                                                            Next
                                                            Exit For
                                                        End If
                                                    Next

                                                    MergeMaterial(dtBoardBarcodes, partid, readedBarcode, sideid)

                                                    'Individual items defects
                                                    For LineNoToRead As Integer = 9 To strLines.Length - 1
                                                        Dim currentline As String() = strLines(LineNoToRead).Split(",")
                                                        Dim ssnExpected As String = currentline(0)
                                                        If ssnExpected = "[COMPONENT_INSP_RESULT]" Then
                                                            'De la fila siguiente hasta 
                                                            For fila As Integer = LineNoToRead + 2 To strLines.Length - 1
                                                                Dim areBarcodesReal As Boolean = False
                                                                Dim datosfila As String() = strLines(fila).Split(",")
                                                                If datosfila(0) = "[COMPONENT_INSP_RESULT_END]" Then
                                                                    filafinal = fila
                                                                    Exit For
                                                                Else
                                                                    index += 1

                                                                    Dim position As Integer = datosfila(0) 'BORARNO COLUMN
                                                                    Dim location As String = datosfila(1) 'LOCATION COLUMN
                                                                    Dim pin_num As String = datosfila(2) 'PIN COLUMN
                                                                    Dim posX As String = datosfila(3) 'POX COLUMN
                                                                    Dim posY As String = datosfila(4) 'POY COLUMN
                                                                    Dim defectCode As String = datosfila(6) 'DEFECTCODE COLUMN
                                                                    Dim userResult As String = datosfila(7) 'RESUTL COLUMN

                                                                    If posX = "" Then
                                                                        posX = 0
                                                                    End If

                                                                    If posY = "" Then
                                                                        posY = 0
                                                                    End If

                                                                    dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Rows.Add(position, location, pin_num, posX, posY, defectCode, userResult)

                                                                    Dim dtBoardBarcodesDFound = dtBoardBarcodes.Select("Position='" & position & "'")
                                                                    If dtBoardBarcodesDFound.Length > 0 Then
                                                                        dtBoardBarcodesDFound(0).Item("Result") = "FAIL"
                                                                        If userResult = "PASS" Then
                                                                            dtBoardBarcodesDFound(0).Item("Operator") = "PASS"
                                                                        Else
                                                                            dtBoardBarcodesDFound(0).Item("Operator") = "FAIL"
                                                                        End If
                                                                        dtBoardBarcodes.AcceptChanges()
                                                                    End If
                                                                End If
                                                            Next
                                                            Exit For
                                                        End If
                                                    Next

                                                    Dim PROCESS_AS_BAD_DUE_NOT_REVISION As Boolean = False

                                                    'If ALL_BOARS_ARE_GOOD = False Then

    Public Function GetShift(Dia As DateTime) As Integer
        If 1 = 1 Then
            Dim dfi = DateTimeFormatInfo.CurrentInfo
            Dim calendar = dfi.Calendar
            Dim semanasystema As Integer = calendar.GetWeekOfYear(Dia, dfi.CalendarWeekRule, DayOfWeek.Sunday)
            Dim dayofwk As Integer = Dia.DayOfWeek
            Dim none As Boolean = True
            '0 de domingo a 6 sabado
            If semanasystema Mod 2 = 0 Then
                none = False
            End If
            'Turno
            Dim shift As Integer = 1
            If dayofwk = 0 And Dia.Hour < 6 Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk <= 3 And Dia.Hour < 6 Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk < 3 And Dia.Hour < 18 Then
                shift = 1
            ElseIf dayofwk < 3 And Dia.Hour < 24 Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk >= 4 And Dia.Hour >= 18 Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk >= 4 And Dia.Hour >= 6 Then
                shift = 3
            ElseIf dayofwk > 4 And Dia.Hour < 6 Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk = 4 And Dia.Hour < 6 And none = False Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk = 4 And Dia.Hour < 6 And none = True Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 18 And none = False Then
                shift = 1
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 18 And none = True Then
                shift = 3
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 24 And none = False Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 24 And none = True Then
                shift = 2
            End If

            Return shift
        Else
            Dim dfi = DateTimeFormatInfo.CurrentInfo
            Dim calendar = dfi.Calendar
            Dim semanasystema As Integer = calendar.GetWeekOfYear(Dia, dfi.CalendarWeekRule, DayOfWeek.Sunday)
            Dim dayofwk As Integer = Dia.DayOfWeek
            Dim none As Boolean = True

            If semanasystema Mod 2 = 0 Then
                none = False
            End If
            'Turno
            Dim shift As Integer = 1
            If dayofwk = 0 And Dia.Hour < 6 Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk <= 3 And Dia.Hour < 6 Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk < 3 And Dia.Hour < 18 Then
                shift = 1
            ElseIf dayofwk < 3 And Dia.Hour < 24 Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk >= 4 And Dia.Hour >= 18 Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk >= 4 And Dia.Hour >= 6 Then
                shift = 3
            ElseIf dayofwk > 4 And Dia.Hour < 6 Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk = 4 And Dia.Hour < 6 And none = False Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk = 4 And Dia.Hour < 6 And none = True Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 18 And none = False Then
                shift = 3
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 18 And none = True Then
                shift = 1
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 24 And none = False Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 24 And none = True Then
                shift = 4
            End If

            Return shift
        End If

    Public Sub MergeMaterial(DT As DataTable, PartID As Integer, PanelSSN As String, Side As String)

        Dim mergeFromAOI As Boolean = False

        'GET PARTNUMBER
        Dim partidSideParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
            {
                New SqlParameter("@AreaID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = AreaID},
                New SqlParameter("@PartID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = PartID},
                New SqlParameter("@Side", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = Side}
            }

        ' Check if should merge at AOI via API
        Try
            mergeFromAOI = Parts.ShouldMergeAtAOI(PartID, Side, AreaID)
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteToFile("API Warning: Failed to check ShouldMergeAtAOI for PartID=" & PartID & ", Side=" & Side & ", AreaID=" & AreaID & ": " & ex.Message)
            mergeFromAOI = False
        End Try

        If mergeFromAOI Then

            Dim IsReadedCode As Boolean = True

            'GET PARTNUMBER via API
            Dim PartNumber As String = ""
            Try
                Dim partInfo As PartInfo = Parts.GetPart(partId:=PartID)
                If partInfo IsNot Nothing Then
                    PartNumber = partInfo.PartNumber
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                WriteToFile("API Warning: Failed to get PartNumber for PartID=" & PartID & ": " & ex.Message)
            End Try

            For Each rowSSN As DataRow In DT.Rows
                If rowSSN.Item("Barcode").ToString.Contains("_pnl_") Then
                    IsReadedCode = False
                End If
            Next

            If IsReadedCode Then

                'GENERATE A CODEMASTER.
                Dim contador As Integer = getMergeCounter(PartID)
                Dim dateTimeNow = DateTime.Now
                Dim jDate As String = String.Format("{0}{1}", dateTimeNow.ToString("yy"), dateTimeNow.DayOfYear.ToString("000"))
                Dim parenssn As String = PartNumber.Substring(3, 5) & "-" & jDate & contador.ToString("00000")

                For Each rowSSN As DataRow In DT.Rows
                    Dim position As Integer = rowSSN.Item("Position")
                    Dim Child As String = rowSSN.Item("Barcode")

                    ' Check if child relationship exists via API
                    Dim exists As Boolean = Units.CheckArrayRelationshipExists(Child)

                    If exists Then
                        ' Delete existing relationship via API
                        Dim deleteSuccess As Boolean = Units.DeleteArrayRelationship(Child)
                        If Not deleteSuccess Then
                            WriteToFile($"API Warning: Failed to delete array relationship for Child={Child}")
                        End If
                    End If

                    ' Add new relationship via API
                    Dim addSuccess As Boolean = Units.AddArrayRelationship(parenssn, Child, position)
                    If Not addSuccess Then
                        WriteToFile($"API Warning: Failed to add array relationship Parent={parenssn}, Child={Child}, SortNo={position}")
                    End If
                Next
            Else
                'SKIP 
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub DownloadFile(fileUri As String, localPath As String, Optional EnableSSl As Boolean = False, Optional Passive As Boolean = True)
        Dim ftpRequest As FtpWebRequest = DirectCast(WebRequest.Create(fileUri), FtpWebRequest)
        ftpRequest.Credentials = New NetworkCredential(FTP_USERNAME, FTP_PASSWORD)
        ftpRequest.EnableSsl = EnableSSl
        ftpRequest.UsePassive = Passive
        ftpRequest.Method = WebRequestMethods.Ftp.DownloadFile

        Using ftpResponse As FtpWebResponse = DirectCast(ftpRequest.GetResponse(), FtpWebResponse)
            Using responseStream As Stream = ftpResponse.GetResponseStream()
                Using outputStream As FileStream = File.Create(localPath)
                    responseStream.CopyTo(outputStream)
                End Using
            End Using
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Sub UploadFile(fileUri As String, localPath As String, Optional EnableSSl As Boolean = False, Optional Passive As Boolean = True)
        Dim ftpRequest As FtpWebRequest = DirectCast(WebRequest.Create(fileUri), FtpWebRequest)
        ftpRequest.Credentials = New NetworkCredential(FTP_USERNAME, FTP_PASSWORD)
        ftpRequest.EnableSsl = EnableSSl
        ftpRequest.UsePassive = Passive
        ftpRequest.Method = WebRequestMethods.Ftp.UploadFile

        Using fileStream As FileStream = File.OpenRead(localPath)
            Dim requestStream As Stream = ftpRequest.GetRequestStream()
            fileStream.CopyTo(requestStream)
            requestStream.Close()
        End Using
    End Sub

    Public Function FindThirdSlash(input As String) As Integer
        Dim count As Integer = 0
        For i As Integer = 0 To input.Length - 1
            If input(i) = "/"c Then
                count += 1
                If count = 3 Then
                    Return i
                End If
            End If
        Next
        Return -1 ' Return -1 if there is no third slash
    End Function

    Public Function FtpFileExists(ftpFileUri As String, user As String, pass As String) As Boolean
        Try
            Dim request As FtpWebRequest = DirectCast(WebRequest.Create(ftpFileUri), FtpWebRequest)
            request.Method = WebRequestMethods.Ftp.GetFileSize
            request.Credentials = New NetworkCredential(user, pass)
            Using response As FtpWebResponse = DirectCast(request.GetResponse(), FtpWebResponse)
                Return True
            End Using
        Catch ex As WebException
            Dim resp = TryCast(ex.Response, FtpWebResponse)
            If resp IsNot Nothing AndAlso resp.StatusCode = FtpStatusCode.ActionNotTakenFileUnavailable Then
                Return False
            Else
                Throw ' Otro error, re-lanzar para ser manejado arriba
            End If
        End Try
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Convert List(Of T) to DataTable
    ''' Helper function to convert API responses to DataTable format
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function ConvertListToDataTable(Of T)(ByVal list As List(Of T)) As DataTable
        Dim dt As New DataTable()

        ' Return empty DataTable if list is Nothing or empty
        If list Is Nothing OrElse list.Count = 0 Then
            Return dt
        End If

        ' Get properties of T
        Dim properties = GetType(T).GetProperties()

        ' Add columns based on properties
        For Each prop In properties
            dt.Columns.Add(prop.Name, If(Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(prop.PropertyType), prop.PropertyType))
        Next

        ' Add rows
        For Each item In list
            Dim row = dt.NewRow()
            For Each prop In properties
                Dim value = prop.GetValue(item, Nothing)
                row(prop.Name) = If(value, DBNull.Value)
            Next
            dt.Rows.Add(row)
        Next

        Return dt
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Reads StationID from text file. Creates file with default value 9999 if it doesn't exist.
    ''' File location: C:\BeFirst\Services\AutoExtractAOI\stationid.txt
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function GetStationIDFromFile() As Integer
        Dim filePath As String = "C:\BeFirst\Services\AutoExtractAOI\stationid.txt"
        Dim defaultStationID As Integer = 9999
        Dim stationID As Integer = defaultStationID

        Try
            ' Create directory if it doesn't exist
            Dim directoryPath As String = Path.GetDirectoryName(filePath)
            If Not Directory.Exists(directoryPath) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(directoryPath)
                WriteToFile($"Created directory: {directoryPath}")
            End If

            ' Check if file exists
            If Not File.Exists(filePath) Then
                ' Create file with default value
                File.WriteAllText(filePath, defaultStationID.ToString())
                WriteToFile($"Created StationID file with default value {defaultStationID}: {filePath}")
                Return defaultStationID
            Else
                ' Read StationID from file
                Dim fileContent As String = File.ReadAllText(filePath).Trim()

                If Integer.TryParse(fileContent, stationID) Then
                    WriteToFile($"Read StationID from file: {stationID}")
                    Return stationID
                Else
                    WriteToFile($"Warning: Invalid StationID in file '{fileContent}'. Using default {defaultStationID}")
                    ' Overwrite with default value
                    File.WriteAllText(filePath, defaultStationID.ToString())
                    Return defaultStationID
                End If
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteToFile($"Error reading StationID file: {ex.Message}. Using default {defaultStationID}")
            Return defaultStationID
        End Try
    End Function


End Module

Imports System.IO
Imports System.Net
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Web
Imports Newtonsoft.Json

Public Module BeApi

    Public Username As String = "APIUser"
    Public Password As String = "UVWt7a2nyaGC"


    Public Class Bearer
        Public Property scope As String = ""
        Public Property token_type As String = ""
        Public Property expires_in As Integer
        Public Property refresh_token As Boolean
        Public Property access_token As String = ""
        Public Property exipres_time As DateTime
    End Class

    Public Class URLInput
        Public Property Name As String = ""
        Public Property Value As String = ""
    End Class

    Public Class APIResponse

        Public Property ResponseCode As Integer = "400"
        Public Property ResponseMessage As String = ""
        Public Property Response As String = ""

    End Class

    Function GeneraOAuth2_ClientCredentials(url As String, consumerKey As String, consumerSecret As String) As Bearer
        Dim result As New Bearer

        Dim byte1 As Byte() = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes("grant_type=client_credentials")

        Dim protocol As String = "http://"

        If ExData.SERVERAPIS.Contains("8443") Then
            protocol = "https://"
        End If

        Dim bearerReq As HttpWebRequest = HttpWebRequest.Create(protocol & ExData.SERVERAPIS & url)
        bearerReq.Accept = "application/json"
        bearerReq.Method = "POST"
        bearerReq.ContentType = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
        bearerReq.ContentLength = byte1.Length
        bearerReq.KeepAlive = False
        bearerReq.Headers.Add("Authorization", "Basic " + Convert.ToBase64String(Encoding.Default.GetBytes(consumerKey + ":" + consumerSecret)))


        Try
            Using newStream As Stream = bearerReq.GetRequestStream()
                newStream.Write(byte1, 0, byte1.Length)
            End Using

            Dim bearerResp As WebResponse = bearerReq.GetResponse()

            Using reader = New StreamReader(bearerResp.GetResponseStream(), Encoding.UTF8)
                Dim response = reader.ReadToEnd()
                result = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of Bearer)(response)
            End Using

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try


        Return result
    End Function

    Public Function API_Call(url As String, Optional Method As String = "GET", Optional Parameters As List(Of URLInput) = Nothing) As APIResponse

        'Check Token Expiration

        If ExData.BEARER.exipres_time < DateTime.Now Then
            ExData.BEARER = GeneraOAuth2_ClientCredentials("/Account/GetTokenAsync", BeApi.Username, BeApi.Password)
        End If

        'Call the API
        Dim APIResult As New APIResponse

        Dim result As String = ""

        If Parameters IsNot Nothing Then

            url = url & "?"

            For Each parameterRow As URLInput In Parameters
                url = url & parameterRow.Name & "=" & HttpUtility.UrlEncode(parameterRow.Value) & "&"
            Next

            url = url.Substring(0, url.Length - 1)
        End If

        Dim protocol As String = "http://"

        If ExData.SERVERAPIS.Contains("8443") Then
            protocol = "https://"
        End If

        Dim apiReq As HttpWebRequest = HttpWebRequest.Create(protocol & ExData.SERVERAPIS & url)
        apiReq.Accept = "application/json"
        apiReq.Method = Method
        If Method = "POST" Then
            apiReq.ContentLength = 0
        End If
        apiReq.ContentType = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
        apiReq.KeepAlive = False
        apiReq.Headers.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " & ExData.BEARER.access_token)

        Try
            Dim bearerResp As HttpWebResponse = apiReq.GetResponse()

            Using reader = New StreamReader(bearerResp.GetResponseStream(), Encoding.UTF8)
                Dim response = reader.ReadToEnd()
                result = response
            End Using

            APIResult.ResponseCode = bearerResp.StatusCode
            APIResult.ResponseMessage = bearerResp.StatusDescription
        Catch ex As WebException
            WriteToFile(ex.ToString())
            Try
                Dim Response As HttpWebResponse = ex.Response
                APIResult.ResponseCode = Response.StatusCode

                Using Stream = ex.Response.GetResponseStream()
                    Using Reader = New StreamReader(Stream)
                        APIResult.ResponseMessage = Reader.ReadToEnd()
                    End Using
                End Using
            Catch ex2 As Exception
                APIResult.ResponseCode = 500
                APIResult.ResponseMessage = ex2.ToString()
            End Try
        Catch ex As Exception
            APIResult.ResponseCode = 500
            APIResult.ResponseMessage = ex.ToString()
        End Try

        APIResult.Response = result

        Return APIResult
    End Function


    ''' <summary>
    ''' Helper function for POST requests with JSON body
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function API_Call_POST(url As String, jsonBody As String) As APIResponse

        ' Check Token Expiration
        If ExData.BEARER.exipres_time < DateTime.Now Then
            ExData.BEARER = GeneraOAuth2_ClientCredentials("/Account/GetTokenAsync", BeApi.Username, BeApi.Password)
        End If

        Dim APIResult As New APIResponse
        Dim result As String = ""

        Dim protocol As String = "http://"
        If ExData.SERVERAPIS.Contains("8443") Then
            protocol = "https://"
        End If

        Try
            Dim apiReq As HttpWebRequest = HttpWebRequest.Create(protocol & ExData.SERVERAPIS & url)
            apiReq.Accept = "application/json"
            apiReq.Method = "POST"
            apiReq.ContentType = "application/json"
            apiReq.KeepAlive = False
            apiReq.Headers.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " & ExData.BEARER.access_token)

            ' Write JSON body
            Dim byte1 As Byte() = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(jsonBody)
            apiReq.ContentLength = byte1.Length

            Using newStream As Stream = apiReq.GetRequestStream()
                newStream.Write(byte1, 0, byte1.Length)
            End Using

            Dim bearerResp As HttpWebResponse = apiReq.GetResponse()

            Using reader = New StreamReader(bearerResp.GetResponseStream(), Encoding.UTF8)
                Dim response = reader.ReadToEnd()
                result = response
            End Using

            APIResult.ResponseCode = bearerResp.StatusCode
            APIResult.ResponseMessage = bearerResp.StatusDescription

        Catch ex As WebException
            Try
                Dim Response As HttpWebResponse = ex.Response
                APIResult.ResponseCode = Response.StatusCode

                Using Stream = ex.Response.GetResponseStream()
                    Using Reader = New StreamReader(Stream)
                        APIResult.ResponseMessage = Reader.ReadToEnd()
                    End Using
                End Using
            Catch ex2 As Exception
                APIResult.ResponseCode = 500
                APIResult.ResponseMessage = ex2.ToString()
            End Try

        Catch ex As Exception
            APIResult.ResponseCode = 500
            APIResult.ResponseMessage = ex.ToString()
        End Try

        APIResult.Response = result
        Return APIResult
    End Function

    Public Function GetString(url As String, Optional Method As String = "GET", Optional Parameters As List(Of URLInput) = Nothing) As String
        Dim result As String = ""

        Dim APIString As APIResponse = API_Call(url, Method, Parameters)

        If APIString.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            result = APIString.Response
        End If

        Return result
    End Function


End Module

Imports System.IO
Imports System.Net
Imports System.Text
Imports Newtonsoft.Json

''' <summary>
''' AOI API Module - Handles all AOI-related API calls
''' Replaces direct SQL operations with REST API endpoints
''' </summary>
Module AOI

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get AOI machine configuration by AOIID
    ''' Replaces: SELECT * FROM Machines_Extractor_AOI WHERE Active='1' AND StationID=...
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetMachineConfig(ByVal aoiId As Integer) As AOIMachineConfig

        Dim resultado As AOIMachineConfig = New AOIMachineConfig()

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "aoiId", .Value = aoiId})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/AOI/GetMachineConfig", "GET", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of AOIMachineConfig)(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get all active AOI machines for a specific station
    ''' Replaces: SELECT * FROM Machines_Extractor_AOI WHERE Active='1' AND StationID=...
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetMachinesByStation(ByVal stationId As Integer) As List(Of AOIMachineConfig)

        Dim resultado As List(Of AOIMachineConfig) = New List(Of AOIMachineConfig)()

        ' Note: This endpoint needs to be created in the API
        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "stationId", .Value = stationId})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/AOI/GetMachinesByStation", "GET", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of List(Of AOIMachineConfig))(APIResponse.Response)
        Else
            WriteToFile(APIResponse.ResponseMessage)
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get all active AOI machines (no station filter)
    ''' Replaces: SELECT * FROM Machines_Extractor_AOI WHERE Active='1'
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetAllActiveMachines() As List(Of AOIMachineConfig)

        Dim resultado As List(Of AOIMachineConfig) = New List(Of AOIMachineConfig)()

        ' Note: This endpoint needs to be created in the API
        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/AOI/GetAllActiveMachines", "GET", Nothing)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of List(Of AOIMachineConfig))(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Submit a single AOI inspection record
    ''' Replaces: INSERT INTO Machines_Extractor_AOI_Data
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function SubmitInspection(ByVal request As AOIInspectionRequest) As AOIDataResponse

        Dim resultado As AOIDataResponse = New AOIDataResponse()

        ' Serialize request to JSON
        Dim jsonBody As String = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(request)

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call_POST("/AOI/SubmitInspection", jsonBody)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of AOIDataResponse)(APIResponse.Response)
        Else
            resultado.Success = False
            resultado.Message = APIResponse.ResponseMessage
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Submit multiple AOI inspection records in batch
    ''' Replaces: Multiple INSERT INTO Machines_Extractor_AOI_Data statements
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function SubmitInspectionBatch(ByVal requests As List(Of AOIInspectionRequest)) As AOIBatchResponse

        Dim resultado As AOIBatchResponse = New AOIBatchResponse()

        ' Serialize request list to JSON
        Dim jsonBody As String = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(requests)

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call_POST("/AOI/SubmitInspectionBatch", jsonBody)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Or APIResponse.ResponseCode = 207 Then ' 207 = Multi-Status (partial success)
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of AOIBatchResponse)(APIResponse.Response)
        Else
            resultado.Success = False
            If resultado.Errors Is Nothing Then
                resultado.Errors = New List(Of String)()
            End If
            resultado.Errors.Add(APIResponse.ResponseMessage)
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get AOI program counter
    ''' Replaces: SELECT counter FROM Machines_Extractor_AOI_Programs WHERE...
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetProgramCounter(ByVal aoiId As Integer, ByVal partId As Integer, ByVal side As String) As AOIProgramCounter

        Dim resultado As AOIProgramCounter = New AOIProgramCounter()

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "aoiId", .Value = aoiId})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "partId", .Value = partId})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "side", .Value = side})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/AOI/GetProgramCounter", "GET", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of AOIProgramCounter)(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Update AOI program counter
    ''' Replaces: UPDATE Machines_Extractor_AOI_Programs SET counter=...
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function UpdateProgramCounter(ByVal aoiId As Integer, ByVal partId As Integer, ByVal side As String, ByVal counter As Integer) As Boolean

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "aoiId", .Value = aoiId})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "partId", .Value = partId})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "side", .Value = side})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "counter", .Value = counter})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/AOI/UpdateProgramCounter", "POST", ParametersTransit)

        Return APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Create or update AOI program (upsert)
    ''' Replaces: INSERT INTO Machines_Extractor_AOI_Programs or UPDATE
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function CreateOrUpdateProgram(ByVal aoiId As Integer, ByVal partId As Integer, ByVal side As String, ByVal arrQty As Integer, ByVal counter As Integer) As Boolean

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "aoiId", .Value = aoiId})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "partId", .Value = partId})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "side", .Value = side})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "arrQty", .Value = arrQty})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "counter", .Value = counter})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/AOI/CreateOrUpdateProgram", "POST", ParametersTransit)

        Return APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Helper function for POST requests with JSON body
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function API_Call_POST(url As String, jsonBody As String) As APIResponse

        ' Check Token Expiration
        If ExData.BEARER.exipres_time < DateTime.Now Then
            ExData.BEARER = GeneraOAuth2_ClientCredentials("/Account/GetTokenAsync", BeApi.Username, BeApi.Password)
        End If

        Dim APIResult As New APIResponse
        Dim result As String = ""

        Dim protocol As String = "http://"
        If ExData.SERVERAPIS.Contains("8443") Then
            protocol = "https://"
        End If

        Try
            Dim apiReq As HttpWebRequest = HttpWebRequest.Create(protocol & ExData.SERVERAPIS & url)
            apiReq.Accept = "application/json"
            apiReq.Method = "POST"
            apiReq.ContentType = "application/json"
            apiReq.KeepAlive = False
            apiReq.Headers.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " & ExData.BEARER.access_token)

            ' Write JSON body
            Dim byte1 As Byte() = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(jsonBody)
            apiReq.ContentLength = byte1.Length

            Using newStream As Stream = apiReq.GetRequestStream()
                newStream.Write(byte1, 0, byte1.Length)
            End Using

            Dim bearerResp As HttpWebResponse = apiReq.GetResponse()

            Using reader = New StreamReader(bearerResp.GetResponseStream(), Encoding.UTF8)
                Dim response = reader.ReadToEnd()
                result = response
            End Using

            APIResult.ResponseCode = bearerResp.StatusCode
            APIResult.ResponseMessage = bearerResp.StatusDescription

        Catch ex As WebException
            Try
                Dim Response As HttpWebResponse = ex.Response
                APIResult.ResponseCode = Response.StatusCode

                Using Stream = ex.Response.GetResponseStream()
                    Using Reader = New StreamReader(Stream)
                        APIResult.ResponseMessage = Reader.ReadToEnd()
                    End Using
                End Using
            Catch ex2 As Exception
                APIResult.ResponseCode = 500
                APIResult.ResponseMessage = ex2.ToString()
            End Try

        Catch ex As Exception
            APIResult.ResponseCode = 500
            APIResult.ResponseMessage = ex.ToString()
        End Try

        APIResult.Response = result
        Return APIResult
    End Function





End Module

#Region "Data Classes"

''' <summary>

Public Class AOIMachineConfig
    Public Property AutoId As Integer
    Public Property Aoiid As Integer

End Class

''' </summary>
Public Class AOIInspectionRequest
    Public Property Sn As String                  ' Serial number (required)

Now I can see the issue. Looking at the code, I can identify several places where API call failures might cause the service to stop:

1. **Line 59-72 in ExService.vb**: API call to get AOI machines. If this fails, it sets `executeCorrectly = 5` but then the service continues. However, the `aoiMachines` list is empty, so the service doesn't process anything but doesn't crash either.

2. **Lines 600-610**: Batch submission to API. If this fails, it just logs the error but doesn't stop the service.

3. **API_Call function in BeApi.vb**: Lines 115-143. This is where the problem likely is. When there's a `WebException` or other exception, it catches it and returns an APIResponse with an error code, but it doesn't throw an exception that would stop the service.

However, looking more carefully at the code structure, I notice that:

1. The service appears to have try-catch blocks around API calls
2. When API calls fail, they log errors but continue
3. The service should theoretically keep running even if API calls fail

But I suspect the issue might be:
1. **Token expiration** - If the token expires and can't be renewed (line 79-81 in BeApi.vb, line 157-159), subsequent API calls will fail with 401 errors
2. **Uncaught exceptions in HTTP request/response handling** - WebExceptions might not always be caught properly
3. **Service crash on repeated failures** - If there's a critical exception that escapes the try-catch blocks

Let me look at the Service1.vb file to see how the service timer is set up and how it handles exceptions.

Imports System.IO
Imports System.Threading
Imports System.Configuration
Imports System.Data.SqlClient
Imports System.Net.Mail
Imports System.Globalization
Public Class Service1

    Public Sub StartForDebug(ByVal args() As String)
        OnStart(args)
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnStart(ByVal args() As String)

        Dim ServiceName As String = ConfigurationManager.AppSettings("ServiceName")
        Dim ConfStationID As String = ConfigurationManager.AppSettings("StationID")

        'Set ServiceName
        ExData.strServiceName = ServiceName & "_" & ConfStationID


        'Direccion del servicio.
        ExData.ServiceLog = "C:\BeFirst\Services\" & ExData.strServiceName & ".txt"

        'Server Data
        BeConfig.CreateConfigurationDirectory()

        'Save File
        BeConfig.SaveConfigurationFile()

        ' ===== FOR LOCAL DEBUGGING ONLY - BYPASS SSL CERTIFICATE VALIDATION =====
        ' WARNING: REMOVE THIS IN PRODUCTION!
        System.Net.ServicePointManager.ServerCertificateValidationCallback = Function(sender, certificate, chain, sslPolicyErrors) True
        ' ==========================================================================

        '2023-01-10 EM: Set Bearer for api.
        ExData.BEARER = New Bearer
        ExData.BEARER = GeneraOAuth2_ClientCredentials("/Account/GetTokenAsync", BeApi.Username, BeApi.Password)


        '2023-01-13 EM: Update Settings
        'Settings.UpdateGlobalSettings()

        BeAgent.UpdateAgentID()

        BeAgent.Active("Service started")


        '◘ Read File (Configuration)
        Me.ScheduleService()

    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub OnStop()
        BeAgent.Serious("Service stopped")
        ExFunctions.sendServiceError("Service stopped")

        Me.Schedular.Dispose()
    End Sub

    Private Schedular As Timer
    Public Sub ScheduleService()
        If Environment.UserInteractive Then ' TO DEBUG
            Dim result As Boolean = ExService.ServiceCode()
        Else
            Try
                Schedular = New Timer(New TimerCallback(AddressOf SchedularCallback))
                Dim mode As String = ConfigurationManager.AppSettings("Mode").ToUpper()
                ' Me.WriteToFile((Convert.ToString( ExData.strServiceName & " Service Mode: ") & mode) + " {0}")

                'Set the Default Time.
                Dim scheduledTime As DateTime = DateTime.MinValue

                If mode = "DAILY" Then
                    'Get the Scheduled Time from AppSettings.
                    scheduledTime = DateTime.Parse(System.Configuration.ConfigurationManager.AppSettings("ScheduledTime"))
                    If DateTime.Now > scheduledTime Then
                        'If Scheduled Time is passed set Schedule for the next day.
                        scheduledTime = scheduledTime.AddDays(1)
                    End If
                End If

                If mode.ToUpper() = "INTERVAL" Then
                    'Get the Interval in Minutes from AppSettings.
                    Dim intervalMinutes As Integer = Convert.ToInt32(ConfigurationManager.AppSettings("IntervalMinutes"))

                    'Set the Scheduled Time by adding the Interval to Current Time.
                    scheduledTime = DateTime.Now.AddMinutes(intervalMinutes)
                    If DateTime.Now > scheduledTime Then
                        'If Scheduled Time is passed set Schedule for the next Interval.
                        scheduledTime = scheduledTime.AddMinutes(intervalMinutes)
                    End If
                End If

                If mode.ToUpper() = "INTERVALSECONDS" Then
                    'Get the Interval in Minutes from AppSettings.
                    Dim intervalSeconds As Integer = Convert.ToInt32(ConfigurationManager.AppSettings("IntervalSeconds"))

                    'Set the Scheduled Time by adding the Interval to Current Time.
                    scheduledTime = DateTime.Now.AddSeconds(intervalSeconds)
                    If DateTime.Now > scheduledTime Then
                        'If Scheduled Time is passed set Schedule for the next Interval.
                        scheduledTime = scheduledTime.AddSeconds(intervalSeconds)
                    End If
                End If

                Dim timeSpan As TimeSpan = scheduledTime.Subtract(DateTime.Now)
                Dim schedule As String = String.Format("{0} day(s) {1} hour(s) {2} minute(s) {3} seconds(s)", timeSpan.Days, timeSpan.Hours, timeSpan.Minutes, timeSpan.Seconds)

                'BeAgent.Log((Convert.ToString("Service scheduled to run after: ") & schedule) + " {0}")

                'Get the difference in Minutes between the Scheduled and Current Time.
                Dim dueTime As Integer = Convert.ToInt32(timeSpan.TotalMilliseconds)

                'Change the Timer's Due Time.
                Schedular.Change(dueTime, Timeout.Infinite)
            Catch ex As Exception
                BeAgent.Serious(" Service Error on: {0} " + ex.Message + ex.StackTrace)

                'Stop the Windows Service.
                'Using serviceController As New System.ServiceProcess.ServiceController(ExData.strServiceName)
                '    serviceController.[Stop]()
                'End Using
            End Try

        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub SchedularCallback(e As Object)
        Dim result As Boolean = ExService.ServiceCode()

        'ExFunctions.WriteToFile("Result of each iteration: " & result)
        BeAgent.PingConnection()

        Me.ScheduleService()

    End Sub

End Class

Private Sub SchedularCallback(e As Object)
        Try
            Dim result As Boolean = ExService.ServiceCode()

            'ExFunctions.WriteToFile("Result of each iteration: " & result)
            BeAgent.PingConnection()

        Catch ex As Exception
            ' CRITICAL: Log exception but DO NOT stop service
            Try
                WriteToFile("SchedularCallback Error (Service will continue): " & ex.ToString())
                BeAgent.Serious("SchedularCallback Error: " & ex.Message)
            Catch logEx As Exception
                ' If logging fails, try to at least write to event log
                Try
                    System.Diagnostics.EventLog.WriteEntry(ExData.strServiceName, "Fatal error: " & ex.ToString() & " | Log error: " & logEx.ToString(), System.Diagnostics.EventLogEntryType.Error)
                Catch
                    ' Last resort - do nothing, just keep service alive
                End Try
            End Try
        Finally
            ' ALWAYS reschedule, even if there was an exception
            Try
                Me.ScheduleService()
            Catch schedEx As Exception
                ' If rescheduling fails, try one more time after a delay
                Try
                    WriteToFile("Rescheduling failed, retrying in 30 seconds: " & schedEx.ToString())
                    System.Threading.Thread.Sleep(30000) ' Wait 30 seconds
                    Me.ScheduleService()
                Catch
                    ' If this fails, service is dead - log to event log
                    System.Diagnostics.EventLog.WriteEntry(ExData.strServiceName, "CRITICAL: Unable to reschedule service timer", System.Diagnostics.EventLogEntryType.Error)
                End Try
            End Try
        End Try

    End Sub

﻿Imports System.IO
Imports System.Net
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Web
Imports Newtonsoft.Json

Public Module BeApi

    Public Username As String = "APIUser"
    Public Password As String = "UVWt7a2nyaGC"


    Public Class Bearer
        Public Property scope As String = ""
        Public Property token_type As String = ""
        Public Property expires_in As Integer
        Public Property refresh_token As Boolean
        Public Property access_token As String = ""
        Public Property exipres_time As DateTime
    End Class

    Public Class URLInput
        Public Property Name As String = ""
        Public Property Value As String = ""
    End Class

    Public Class APIResponse

        Public Property ResponseCode As Integer = "400"
        Public Property ResponseMessage As String = ""
        Public Property Response As String = ""

    End Class

    Function GeneraOAuth2_ClientCredentials(url As String, consumerKey As String, consumerSecret As String) As Bearer
        Dim result As New Bearer

        Dim byte1 As Byte() = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes("grant_type=client_credentials")

        Dim protocol As String = "http://"

        If ExData.SERVERAPIS.Contains("8443") Then
            protocol = "https://"
        End If

        Dim bearerReq As HttpWebRequest = HttpWebRequest.Create(protocol & ExData.SERVERAPIS & url)
        bearerReq.Accept = "application/json"
        bearerReq.Method = "POST"
        bearerReq.ContentType = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
        bearerReq.ContentLength = byte1.Length
        bearerReq.KeepAlive = False
        bearerReq.Headers.Add("Authorization", "Basic " + Convert.ToBase64String(Encoding.Default.GetBytes(consumerKey + ":" + consumerSecret)))


        Try
            Using newStream As Stream = bearerReq.GetRequestStream()
                newStream.Write(byte1, 0, byte1.Length)
            End Using

            Dim bearerResp As WebResponse = bearerReq.GetResponse()

            Using reader = New StreamReader(bearerResp.GetResponseStream(), Encoding.UTF8)
                Dim response = reader.ReadToEnd()
                result = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of Bearer)(response)
            End Using

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try


        Return result
    End Function

    Public Function API_Call(url As String, Optional Method As String = "GET", Optional Parameters As List(Of URLInput) = Nothing) As APIResponse

        'Check Token Expiration

        If ExData.BEARER.exipres_time < DateTime.Now Then
            ExData.BEARER = GeneraOAuth2_ClientCredentials("/Account/GetTokenAsync", BeApi.Username, BeApi.Password)
        End If

        'Call the API
        Dim APIResult As New APIResponse

        Dim result As String = ""

        If Parameters IsNot Nothing Then

            url = url & "?"

            For Each parameterRow As URLInput In Parameters
                url = url & parameterRow.Name & "=" & HttpUtility.UrlEncode(parameterRow.Value) & "&"
            Next

            url = url.Substring(0, url.Length - 1)
        End If

        Dim protocol As String = "http://"

        If ExData.SERVERAPIS.Contains("8443") Then
            protocol = "https://"
        End If

        Dim apiReq As HttpWebRequest = HttpWebRequest.Create(protocol & ExData.SERVERAPIS & url)
        apiReq.Accept = "application/json"
        apiReq.Method = Method
        If Method = "POST" Then
            apiReq.ContentLength = 0
        End If
        apiReq.ContentType = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
        apiReq.KeepAlive = False
        apiReq.Headers.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " & ExData.BEARER.access_token)

        Try
            Dim bearerResp As HttpWebResponse = apiReq.GetResponse()

            Using reader = New StreamReader(bearerResp.GetResponseStream(), Encoding.UTF8)
                Dim response = reader.ReadToEnd()
                result = response
            End Using

            APIResult.ResponseCode = bearerResp.StatusCode
            APIResult.ResponseMessage = bearerResp.StatusDescription
        Catch ex As WebException
            WriteToFile(ex.ToString())
            Try
                Dim Response As HttpWebResponse = ex.Response
                APIResult.ResponseCode = Response.StatusCode

                Using Stream = ex.Response.GetResponseStream()
                    Using Reader = New StreamReader(Stream)
                        APIResult.ResponseMessage = Reader.ReadToEnd()
                    End Using
                End Using
            Catch ex2 As Exception
                APIResult.ResponseCode = 500
                APIResult.ResponseMessage = ex2.ToString()
            End Try
        Catch ex As Exception
            APIResult.ResponseCode = 500
            APIResult.ResponseMessage = ex.ToString()
        End Try

        APIResult.Response = result

        Return APIResult
    End Function


    ''' <summary>

    ''' </summary>

        End If

            apiReq.Method = "POST"
            apiReq.ContentType = "application/json"
            apiReq.KeepAlive = False
            apiReq.Headers.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " & ExData.BEARER.access_token)

            Using newStream As Stream = apiReq.GetRequestStream()
                newStream.Write(byte1, 0, byte1.Length)
            End Using

            Dim bearerResp As HttpWebResponse = apiReq.GetResponse()

            Using reader = New StreamReader(bearerResp.GetResponseStream(), Encoding.UTF8)
                Dim response = reader.ReadToEnd()
                result = response
            End Using

            APIResult.ResponseCode = bearerResp.StatusCode
            APIResult.ResponseMessage = bearerResp.StatusDescription

        Catch ex As WebException
            Try
                Dim Response As HttpWebResponse = ex.Response
                APIResult.ResponseCode = Response.StatusCode

                Using Stream = ex.Response.GetResponseStream()
                    Using Reader = New StreamReader(Stream)
                        APIResult.ResponseMessage = Reader.ReadToEnd()
                    End Using
                End Using
            Catch ex2 As Exception
                APIResult.ResponseCode = 500
                APIResult.ResponseMessage = ex2.ToString()
            End Try

        Catch ex As Exception
            APIResult.ResponseCode = 500
            APIResult.ResponseMessage = ex.ToString()
        End Try

        APIResult.Response = result
        Return APIResult
    End Function

    Public Function GetString(url As String, Optional Method As String = "GET", Optional Parameters As List(Of URLInput) = Nothing) As String
        Dim result As String = ""

        Dim APIString As APIResponse = API_Call(url, Method, Parameters)

        If APIString.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            result = APIString.Response
        End If

        Return result
    End Function


End Module

            apiReq.Timeout = 30000 ' 30 seconds timeout

            apiReq.Headers.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " & ExData.BEARER.access_token)

            ' Write JSON body
            Dim byte1 As Byte() = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(jsonBody)
            apiReq.ContentLength = byte1.Length

            Using newStream As Stream = apiReq.GetRequestStream()
                newStream.Write(byte1, 0, byte1.Length)
            End Using

            Dim bearerResp As HttpWebResponse = apiReq.GetResponse()

            Using reader = New StreamReader(bearerResp.GetResponseStream(), Encoding.UTF8)
                Dim response = reader.ReadToEnd()
                result = response
            End Using

            APIResult.ResponseCode = bearerResp.StatusCode
            APIResult.ResponseMessage = bearerResp.StatusDescription

        Catch ex As WebException
            Try
                Dim Response As HttpWebResponse = ex.Response
                APIResult.ResponseCode = Response.StatusCode

                Using Stream = ex.Response.GetResponseStream()
                    Using Reader = New StreamReader(Stream)
                        APIResult.ResponseMessage = Reader.ReadToEnd()
                    End Using
                End Using
            Catch ex2 As Exception
                APIResult.ResponseCode = 500
                APIResult.ResponseMessage = ex2.ToString()
            End Try

        Catch ex As Exception
            APIResult.ResponseCode = 500
            APIResult.ResponseMessage = ex.ToString()
        End Try

        APIResult.Response = result
        Return APIResult
    End Function

    Public Function GetString(url As String, Optional Method As String = "GET", Optional Parameters As List(Of URLInput) = Nothing) As String
        Dim result As String = ""

        Dim APIString As APIResponse = API_Call(url, Method, Parameters)

        If APIString.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            result = APIString.Response
        End If

        Return result
    End Function
